title: Document
description: The universal convergence artefact — a file's stable identity in the graph, bi-directionally interconnected with the graph. Binds datalayer · templates · schemas · ontology · prompt via its optional fields. CONFORMS_TO a Schema; REVISION_OF points to DocRevisions (document/_main.py; Spec 292).

path.description: Absolute filesystem path (or a render-ref for in-memory renders: 'render:<sha>').

content_sha.description: SHA-256 of the file body at the time of ingest/render — used for change detection.

template.description: Name of the template that generated this Document (optional — binds the Templates substrate layer).

schema.description: Name of the Schema this Document CONFORMS_TO (optional — binds the Schemas substrate layer).
